description: Bifolio that seems to have originally contained official-looking accounts in Arabic script but which might pertain to the qodesh rather than to the state (al-marsūm... iqtiṭāʿatuh bism Aḥmad b. Ibrāhīm... al-tawfīr... fī khaṭāʾiṭ(?) al-yahūd... al-muṭlaq...al-masāmīr...). On the other two pages, there are private accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. Needs further examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
